name: Plume cloth handbag
description:
Beautiful, vintage Hermès Porte-Documents Plume 38 briefcase handbag in Ecru Beige Toile H canvas. The sides, bottom, and top of the bag consist of a fine-grained, supple leather called Veau Evercalf in a dark brown color called Ebene. The bag has gold-plated hardware, including a zipper along the top of the bag and loops for the rolled leather handles. The bag is a very versatile style in a neutral color scheme and can be used to carry a variety of items including larger electronics such as a 15-in laptop. Great on the go, classic bag that will elevate any outfit and is part of the popular Hermès Plume line of bags.

Made in France
Date stamp Square F (2002) 
Gold Hermès Made in France stamp inside
Gold hardware
Body made of Ecru Beige Toile H canvas
Sides, bottom, and top consist of a fine-grained leather, Veau Evercalf
Color of leather is a dark brown color called Ebene
Complementary dark brown stitching throughout 
Two rolled leather handles with gold loops and leather tabs
Protective feet at base
Zip closure that opens full top of bag
Leather and metal zipper pull stamped Hermès
Large, lightweight style bag
One exterior pocket lined with Toile H canvas with leather trim
Interior consists of Ebene Chevre goatskin leather
One interior leather pocket lined in dark brown suede

Very good/good condition, well maintained
Bag shape is slightly relaxed, some light scratches on leather sides and bottom, very slight wear at corners, protective feet at base show scratches, rubbing, slight tarnish, and loss of plating, one rolled handle has small cracks in one spot along edge, small indents to leather tabs that hold handles, light mark and indent to toile from handle on back, the toile has a few spots including one spot near the front pocket and another near the bottom, zipper shows tarnish and loss of plating and is more silver in color, zipper works great, interior base of bag has some indents from protective feet and a few marks, suede lining of interior pocket has some small marks, bag is clean at exterior and interior, leather sides and top show very light wear, toile is in good shape, toile and leather have nice sheen and texture.

Measurements (approximate, flat):
Height 11"
Width 15"
Depth 3"
Handle drop 4.5"

Smoke free home.
